steps.title: Recognize the transformation
steps.content: When a graph is translated up 5 units, every output value increases by 5. This means $g(x) = f(x) + 5$. To find $g(0)$, we need to calculate $f(0) + 5$.

steps.title: Evaluate f(0) using the factored form
steps.content:
The factored form is efficient here—substitute $x = 0$ directly without expanding:
$$f(0) = (0 - 8)(0 - 7)(0 - 4) = (-8)(-7)(-4)$$
Multiply left to right: $(-8) \times (-7) = 56$, then $56 \times (-4) = -224$.

So $f(0) = -224$.
